plugins.name: orchestration
plugins.description: Agent delegation framework, multi-agent research orchestration, and session lifecycle. Decompose work across model tiers, manage parallel swarms, govern quality, and persist session state.

plugins.name: product-craft
plugins.description: Product definition skills: extract specs from stakeholders, write user stories, and establish ubiquitous language.

plugins.name: dev-discipline
plugins.description: Software engineering discipline with development lifecycle orchestration. Plan-implement-review-fix loop, TDD, defensive planning, systematic debugging, code review, bug triage, architecture improvement, and worktree-isolated implementation agents.

plugins.name: prompt-engineering
plugins.description: Evaluate and optimize Claude system prompts using Anthropic-grounded patterns.

plugins.name: manifesto
plugins.description: Create concentrated manifesto declarations and bind Claude behavior to user-provided manifestos through identity-assumption protocols.

plugins.name: python-tools
plugins.description: Python development tooling: debug type errors in uv-managed projects with pyright, and perform AST-based mass structural edits across codebases.

plugins.name: qa-automation
plugins.description: Playwright test lifecycle orchestrator. One skill drives the full loop: plan from live browser exploration, generate accessible .spec.ts files, execute with failure classification, and self-heal broken locators via deterministic ten-tier recovery with confidence-based PR routing.

plugins.name: userland-utilities
plugins.description: Practical utilities for common desktop and system tasks. Includes macOS app bundle repair (Gatekeeper, code signing, quarantine flags).
